name: Chick-Pea Salad
recipeIngredient: Generous pinches of salt and pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and rinse the chick-peas.
2. Combine with red and green peppers and sliced green onions in a bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together all dressing ingredients.
4. Toss salad with dressing; refrigerate until ready to serve.
5. Flavor improves if left to marinate overnight.
6. Serves 6-8
